human_task_name: SynAIpse CC1: preserve and prove the timed Worker draft
objective: Re-attest the bounded CC1 draft after the original packet probe expired, run the declared focused proof, and preserve the implementation handoff without broadening the prior Worker scope.

decision_frame.value: Recover fresh evidence for an otherwise bounded draft without discarding source work or pretending an expired artifact probe is current.
decision_frame.why_now: The original CC1 Worker packet's five-minute artifact-probe freshness window expired while the Worker was completing focused validation.
acceptance_criteria: The existing bounded decision-effects draft remains confined to the original allowed source paths.
The Worker re-attests the new recovery packet and probe, runs the declared focused validation, and writes one valid handoff/result pair.
No source scope, target SHA, command invocation, hosted state, or authority is expanded by this recovery.
dependencies: Original bounded uncommitted draft created only in the original packet's allowed source paths.
decision_frame.risk_or_learning_target: Make time-bounded artifact freshness fail closed while preserving rather than duplicating a valid bounded draft.
decision_frame.smallest_increment: One fresh attestation/proof artifact pair for the same Worker draft.

non_goals: Do not add any source surface beyond the original CC1 Worker packet allowed_write_paths.
Do not alter synaipse-state/v1, context handling, package/docs/generated surfaces, commands/routes, or hosted state.
Do not execute a recommended command or create a new worktree/branch.
Do not commit, push, merge, rebase, reset, stash, clean, or delete anything.

validation_entrypoints: pnpm exec vitest run src/commands/next-agent-parity.test.ts src/commands/next-decision-meta.test.ts src/commands/next.test.ts src/lib/decision/harness-decision.test.ts src/lib/synaipse/state.test.ts --reporter=dot

delegated_decision_rights: Verify and, only if necessary, correct the original bounded CC1 draft within its same allowed paths.
Run the declared focused tests and write only declared recovery evidence.

stop_conditions: the fresh recovery probe expires before proof
